rules.description: Use common sense and follow the reddit site-wide rules
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>Use common sense and follow the reddit site-wide rules</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.description:
Pro-AI top level posts will be removed. 

This subreddit is for critical discussion surrounding AI. 

This includes but is not limited to: Criticism of
generative AI/LLMs, AI art, the environmental impact of AI, philosophical arguments against AI, economic impacts of AI, mistakes and danger of over reliance on AI, futurism and AI

Unlike other subreddits, we won’t ban everyone with pro-ai views. However, this is not a debate subreddit.

People that come here to argue in bad faith, troll, name call, or start internet drama will be banned.

As per the site-wide rules, censor all personal information, including the names of other subreddits and all personal social media usernames unless they are a public figure. THIS RULE WILL BE STRICTLY ENFORCED. ABSOLUTELY NO BAN MESSAGES FROM OTHER SUBREDDITS. THESE POSTS WILL RESULT IN A 3 DAY TEMPBAN
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>As per the site-wide rules, censor all personal information, including the names of other subreddits and all personal social media usernames unless they are a public figure. THIS RULE WILL BE STRICTLY ENFORCED. ABSOLUTELY NO BAN MESSAGES FROM OTHER SUBREDDITS. THESE POSTS WILL RESULT IN A 3 DAY TEMPBAN</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.description: AI generated images must be marked using the Spoiler or NSFW tag or it will be removed.
rules.short_name: AI generated images must be marked Spoiler
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>AI generated images must be marked using the Spoiler or NSFW tag or it will be removed.</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.description: This includes memes, overt, or indirect threats of violence/harassment.
rules.short_name: Harassment or threats of violence will result in an instant ban
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>This includes memes, overt, or indirect threats of violence/harassment.</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.description:
No encouraging comments or posts on other subreddits. 

Minimize screenshots of arguments from other posts/subreddits. These may be locked at Mod discretion.

Let’s rise above the toxicity and keep posts focused on critical arguments and discussion about AI instead of internet drama.
While we appreciate human-created art, please limit these posts to Sundays to allow space for other anti-ai discussions
rules.short_name: Art posts should only be posted on Art Showcase Sundays
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>While we appreciate human-created art, please limit these posts to Sundays to allow space for other anti-ai discussions</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->
